loginDescription: Sign in to manage requirements, tests, and traceability.
serverAddressPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default server
serverAddressHelp: For company installations, enter the API address provided by your administrator.
serverOrLoginError: The server could not be reached or the credentials are invalid.
name: Name
addChildHeading: Add a child heading under this heading
numberingHelp: Starts this heading at the number you enter; following headings continue from it. Child headings begin at 1 within their own level.
deleteHeadingWithChildren: This heading contains content. Delete the whole subtree or move its direct child headings and rows one level up.
deleteOnlyAndPromote: Delete only this heading and move child content up one level
deleteWithAllContent: Delete the heading and all content below it
profileVisibilityHelp: These details are visible to users in the same organization.
conflictError: The row was changed by another user; the latest version was loaded.
commentAddFailed: The comment could not be added. Check the server connection and row access.
executionStartFailed: The test execution could not be started. Executions can only start on test cases.
emptyDocument: This document is empty. Right-click to add rows.
selectDocument: Select a document from the tree.
emptyWorkspaceDescription: Start with a requirements or test document. You can organize it into folders later.
recentDocumentsDescription: Continue working with documents you opened recently.
noRecentDocuments: There are no recently used documents yet.
workspaceStartDescription: Open a document from Explorer or continue with a recent document.
title: Title
selectRow: Select a row to see its details.
columnType: Type: text, integer, decimal, boolean, date, single_select, multi_select, url
aboutText: Requirements, test, and document management system
searchLinkTarget: Search for a requirement or test to link
linkSearchHint: Search by document, requirement, or test name.
baselineComparisonVersion: Baseline v{{version}} compared with current document
restoreVersionImpact: Only this object's authoring fields will be restored. Links and child objects are preserved; linked objects will be marked suspect.
noDocumentHistory: No document history matches this search.
deleteSelectedConfirm: The selected {{count}} rows and their children will be moved to trash.
columnOptionsHint: Enter one option per line or separate with commas
advancedSearch: Search requirements, tests, links and fields
deleteRowImpactDescription: This object will be soft-deleted and can be restored from Trash.
deleteSubtreeImpactDescription: Deleting the complete subtree affects this object and every descendant. You can instead promote its direct children.
bulkDeleteImpactDescription: The selection is normalized to root objects; descendants below those roots are included once.
deleteLinkedObjectsWarning: Traceability links connected to deleted objects will also be removed and audited.
bulkEditImpactWarning: The chosen value replaces the current value in every editable selected object. Existing traceability links may become suspect.

bulkImpactDescription.edit: The selected field will be replaced on every editable selected object.
bulkImpactDescription.move: Selected root objects and their descendants will move without changing object IDs.
bulkImpactDescription.copy: Selected root objects and their descendants will be copied with new object IDs.
bulkImpactDescription.link: A traceability link will be created from every selected object to the target object.

baselineImpactDescription: A baseline creates an immutable official snapshot of the current document without modifying its objects.
baselineImpactWarning: Changes made after creation will remain in the working document and can be compared with this baseline.
noEvidence: No evidence or defect is linked to this step.
evidenceAdded: Evidence was added to the execution step.
addComment: Add a comment or mention with @email
searchHint: Type at least two characters to search the workspace.
reviewRequiresBaseline: Create a document baseline before starting a formal review. The review will be bound to that immutable version.
requirementNumberingSettingsHelp: Set the identifier prefix for requirements created later in this document.
requirementPrefixHelp: Use up to 20 letters or numbers, starting with a letter. Existing numbers are unchanged.
ssoHint: Configure an OpenID Connect provider. The callback uses PKCE and validated ID tokens.
clientError: The application interface could not be loaded
chunkLoadError: A newer application version may have been deployed. Reload to continue safely.
deleteFolderMessage: The folder, its subfolders and contained documents will be moved to Trash.
deleteDocumentMessage: The document and its content will be moved to Trash.
testTemplateHelp: Creates the standard sections and one empty test step under a named test heading.
addBlankObjectHelp: Adds an unnumbered object at the selected level.
addBlankObjectBelowHelp: Adds an unnumbered child object below the selected heading.
addTestStepAfter: Add test step after this step
globalSearchHelp: Search requirements, tests, links and custom fields
editLinkedRequirements: Edit linked requirements in row details
advancedFiltersHelp: Combine conditions and keep the hierarchy context that makes results understandable.
noAdvancedFilters: Add a condition to narrow this document.
noTraceResults: No trace relationships match this view.
templateLibraryHelp: Save the whole document or the selected hierarchy and reuse it without changing its source.
selectionCommentHelp: Select text in the title or description, then write a comment or propose its replacement.
dropAtRoot: Drop here to move to the workspace root
dragMoveHint: Moving {{name}} — drop it on a folder or the workspace root.
moveFailed: The item could not be moved. Refresh and try again.
invalidFolderMove: A folder cannot be moved into its own contents.
documentAppearanceSettingsHelp: Control information density and visual editing cues in requirement and test documents.
documentFontSizeHelp: Choose the text size used in requirement, test and text documents.
documentFontFamilyHelp: Choose the preferred typeface family for document content.
documentFontPreview: Document content will use this appearance.
highContrastHelp: Makes borders, focus rings and secondary text more distinct.
documentOverviewHelp: This area changes to row details when a row is selected. With no selection, it shows document coverage and quality.

author.label: Author
author.title: Authoring and quality workspace
author.description: Create requirement and test content, monitor quality rules and complete traceability.

tester.label: Tester
tester.title: Execution workspace
tester.description: Run test steps, capture evidence and follow retest candidates.

reviewer.label: Reviewer
reviewer.title: Review and approval workspace
reviewer.description: Evaluate proposed changes, suspect links and documents awaiting approval in one place.

showHierarchyGuidesHelp: Draw subtle vertical guides for nested headings and objects.
showChangeIndicatorsHelp: Display baseline, local and remote change colors on the left edge of rows.
authoringBehaviorSettingsHelp: Set defaults used while editing structured documents.
enableSpellCheckHelp: Use the operating system dictionary in editable text fields.
defaultFrozenColumnsHelp: Choose how many content columns are frozen, excluding ID.
readinessAdvisoryHelp: Technical assessment of the required criteria for a formal document release
readinessAdvisoryChecksHelp: These checks show execution and review state; they do not block document publication by themselves.
readinessNoIssues: No content issue affecting release confidence was found.
readinessNoRetestCandidates: No retest candidate was derived from suspect links.
readinessExecutionInformation: Test execution information (not a release criterion)
readinessSuspectReason: Reverification required because of a suspect link
readinessBaselineCurrent: The document matches the latest baseline.
baselineReadinessAdvisory: {{count}} required gates are blocked. The assessment is advisory in this phase and does not prevent baseline creation.
impactBaselineReason: Reverification required because of baseline change
completeRunHelp: Give every test step a final result first.
noCommandsFound: No matching command or object found.
paletteNavigateHelp: Use Up/Down to navigate and Enter to open
paletteCommandOnlyHelp: Start with > to show commands only
keyboardShortcutsHelp: Review and customize the shortcuts used for authoring, navigation and workspace actions.
shortcutReassigned: This shortcut was removed from {{command}} to avoid a conflict.
shortcutSettingsHelp: Select a shortcut and press the new key combination. Delete clears it; Escape cancels recording.
editImpactHelp: This object has {{count}} linked reference(s). Review the proposed change before saving.
editImpactWarning: Saving a semantic change marks the connected traceability links as suspect so reviewers can assess and rerun affected tests.

workspace.title: Organize your specification workspace
workspace.description: Explorer keeps folders, requirement documents and test documents together. Open several documents as tabs or compare two in split view.
workspace.tip: Start with one requirement document and one verification test document.

authoring.title: Author structured, reviewable objects
authoring.description: Use headings for hierarchy and objects for controlled content. IDs remain stable while outline numbering follows the document structure.
authoring.tip: Use the toolbar, context menu or your configurable keyboard shortcuts.

traceability.title: Connect requirements and verification
traceability.description: Link requirements to test steps in either direction. Linked-object previews, matrices and suspect-link indicators keep impact visible.
traceability.tip: Open a selected object's Links tab to create and inspect relationships.

verification.title: Baseline, review and execute
verification.description: Publish immutable baselines, review changes, run tests with evidence and use readiness findings to correct coverage or content gaps.
verification.tip: Analysis provides readiness, coverage, traceability, reviews and run history.

rolesAndAccessHelp: Understand the product-facing role names. Effective permissions still depend on the organization, workspace and project scope assigned by an administrator.

roleDescription.viewer: Reads documents, links, baselines and reports without changing controlled content.
roleDescription.editor: Authors and organizes document objects, links, comments and test definitions within the assigned scope.
roleDescription.reviewer: Evaluates baselined content, records formal review decisions and inspects verification evidence.
roleDescription.administrator: Manages membership, access scope and workspace configuration. Administrator access is not implied by document ownership.

roleGuideScopeHelp: These names explain intent; the server always evaluates the concrete permission and scope for every operation.

releaseReadinessStatus.blocked: Required release criteria are not met

readinessGateHelp.content: Checks required fields and test-step content for completeness.
readinessGateHelp.traceability: Checks verification links between requirements and tests.
readinessGateHelp.links_current: Checks suspect links that have not been reassessed.
readinessGateHelp.verification: Shows current test execution results for information.
readinessGateHelp.review: Shows the latest formal review approval state for information.

readinessRule.incomplete_test_step: Test action or expected result is missing
readinessRule.unverified_test_step: Test step has no current passing execution
readinessRule.uncovered_requirement: Requirement has no linked verification test
readinessRule.unlinked_test_step: Test step is not linked to a requirement

readinessRuleWhy.missing_number: A stable identifier is required for references, exports and change review.
readinessRuleWhy.duplicate_number: Two objects cannot be distinguished reliably in traceability and external reports.
readinessRuleWhy.empty_description: The requirement does not state the behavior that must be verified.
readinessRuleWhy.incomplete_test_step: A repeatable test requires both an action and an observable expected result.
readinessRuleWhy.unverified_test_step: No current successful execution proves this step against the latest content.
readinessRuleWhy.uncovered_requirement: No verification test is connected to this requirement.
readinessRuleWhy.unlinked_test_step: The step cannot contribute to requirement coverage without a traceability link.
readinessRuleWhy.untested_requirement: No verification test is connected to this requirement.
readinessRuleWhy.ambiguous_wording: Vague qualifiers can lead different reviewers to interpret the requirement differently.
readinessRuleWhy.weak_obligation: The statement does not express a testable, binding obligation.

adminPanelDescription: Manage users, roles and organization access
usersAndRolesDescription: Activate accounts and assign organization responsibilities.
operationFailed: The operation failed. Review the entered information.
restrictedDocumentDescription: Only administrators and listed users can open this file.
roleBasedAccessDescription: No file-specific restriction is active. Organization roles determine access.
noExplicitPermissions: No file-specific permissions. Access is inherited from roles.
fileAccessDenied: You do not have permission to view this file
fileAccessDeniedDescription: Ask an administrator or the file owner to grant you access.
analyzingImport: Analyzing the source file without changing the document...
importPreviewFailed: The source file could not be analyzed. Verify its format and try again.
importNoChangesUntilConfirm: No document data is changed until you confirm.

importFinding.row_type_not_allowed: Object type is not allowed in this document
importFinding.invalid_parent: Object type is not valid below its parent
importFinding.missing_title: Heading or test name is empty
importFinding.duplicate_number_in_file: Requirement number is duplicated in the source file
importFinding.duplicate_number_in_document: Requirement number already exists in the document

pilotFeedbackHelp: Report a reproducible problem or workflow friction to your organization administrator.
feedbackDescription: What happened, what did you expect and how can it be reproduced?
pilotTelemetryHelp: Off by default. When enabled, DocSys stores only allow-listed action names and limited technical values inside your organization. Document text, passwords, tokens and attachments are never included.
privacyAndDiagnosticsHelp: Control optional diagnostic data used to improve the pilot.
pilotTelemetryDataNotice: This preference is stored on this device and can be disabled at any time. Feedback submission itself does not require telemetry.
noPilotFeedback: No pilot feedback has been submitted.
pilotChecklistHelp: Prepare one controlled project for measurable day-to-day use.

roles.title: Assign pilot roles
roles.description: Name an administrator, author, tester and reviewer; verify Viewer access separately.

requirements.title: Create the requirements document
requirements.description: Define the identifier prefix, headings and minimum required attributes.

tests.title: Create the test document
tests.description: Add repeatable test cases with actions and observable expected results.

migration.title: Preview and validate source data
migration.description: Use the migration preview; resolve hierarchy and duplicate-number findings before confirmation.

traceability.title: Verify bidirectional traceability
traceability.description: Link representative requirements and test steps, then review coverage and suspect links.

baseline.title: Publish the first baseline
baseline.description: Review release readiness, create version 1.0 and export the formal document.

backup.title: Complete a restore drill
backup.description: Create a checksum-verified backup and restore it into a temporary database.

workHub.title: Work and test management
workHub.description: Track defects, delivery work, test plans and their links to controlled engineering evidence.
workHub.sidebarHelp: Work items and test plans share the same project scope as your controlled documents.
workHub.rowContext: New work items can be linked to the currently selected document row.
workHub.documentContext: New work items can be linked to the current document.
workHub.linkSelectedRow: Link this work item to the selected row
workHub.linkCurrentDocument: Link this work item to the current document
workHub.search: Search by key, summary, description or label
workHub.noProjectHelp: Create a project in this workspace before adding work items and test plans.
workHub.noItemsHelp: Create a task or defect, or broaden the active filters.
workHub.noPlansHelp: Create a plan to group test cases by release, environment and verification objective.
workHub.noPlanTests: No tests have been added to this plan.
